title: samba bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[4.19.4-15.0.1]
- s3: winbindd: winbindd_pam: fix leak in extract_pac_vrfy_sigs [Orabug: 36518285]
- s3:passdb: Do not leak memory in pdb_tdb [Orabug: 36371377]
- Gluster volumes not accessible via Samba due to missing samba-vfs-glusterfs in OL8 [Orabug: 30205755]

[4.19.4-15]
- resolves: RHEL-132396 - Fix deadlock between two smbd processes

[4.19.4-14]
- resolves: RHEL-144390 - Fix winbind group resolution

[4.19.4-13]
- resolves: RHEL-131616 - Fix regression with relative symlinks in a share
full_text:
[4.19.4-15.0.1]
- s3: winbindd: winbindd_pam: fix leak in extract_pac_vrfy_sigs [Orabug: 36518285]
- s3:passdb: Do not leak memory in pdb_tdb [Orabug: 36371377]
- Gluster volumes not accessible via Samba due to missing samba-vfs-glusterfs in OL8 [Orabug: 30205755]

[4.19.4-15]
- resolves: RHEL-132396 - Fix deadlock between two smbd processes

[4.19.4-14]
- resolves: RHEL-144390 - Fix winbind group resolution

[4.19.4-13]
- resolves: RHEL-131616 - Fix regression with relative symlinks in a share

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-3662.html
